raw:
{
  "judge_id": "autogen",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The output provides a detailed critique of the draft, identifying specific issues and suggesting improvements, which aligns with the concept of logical consistency.",
    "R1.2": "The output walks through the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs, achieving full marks in this dimension.",
    "R1.3": "The output audits every claim against the evidence reported, providing a thorough analysis that meets the highest standard of logical consistency and evidence alignment.",
    "RX.1": "The output clearly distinguishes between claims with high confidence and those where uncertainty is disclosed, marking each appropriately.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions without drifting from the scope.",
    "RX.4": "The output does not introduce any new errors or harmful content, maintaining a high standard of harm avoidance.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing full traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The output provides a detailed critique of the draft, identifying specific issues and suggesting improvements, which aligns with the concept of logical consistency.
rationale.R1.2: The output walks through the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs, achieving full marks in this dimension.
rationale.R1.3: The output audits every claim against the evidence reported, providing a thorough analysis that meets the highest standard of logical consistency and evidence alignment.
rationale.RX.1: The output clearly distinguishes between claims with high confidence and those where uncertainty is disclosed, marking each appropriately.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions without drifting from the scope.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce any new errors or harmful content, maintaining a high standard of harm avoidance.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing full traceability.
